title: Check mode and facts
description: Check mode predicts changes without applying them, and gathered facts describe each host's current state.
body: Use when previewing changes or branching on host state. Check mode (--check) runs tasks in predict-only mode and reports what would change, best paired with --diff; gather_facts collects host attributes (OS, network, hardware) into variables you can condition on. Do not trust check mode blindly — some modules cannot simulate accurately and may understate impact. Actions: review the diff and confirm fact-based conditionals against real facts. Validation signals include the predicted changes matching the eventual apply. Risk boundary: disabling fact gathering for speed removes the data conditionals rely on, which can misroute tasks.
